de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class JavaASTWalker

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    JavaASTCollector, JavaASTVisitor, ProgramSVCollector, VariableNamer.CustomJavaASTWalker

    public abstract class JavaASTWalker
extends Object
    walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order at default. Implementing method doAction specifies its behaviour at the different Nodes. The depth-left-fist behaviour can be changed by overwriting the method walk(ProgramElement) .

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private int depth
      the current visited level
      private ProgramElement root
      the root the walker starts
